description: Classical baseline — ECDSA auth + ECDH key exchange + TLS 1.3 transport

oracle.description: Dolev-Yao attacker with break_dh quantum oracle
oracle.channel_model: Both ch and ch_tls are public — attacker has full Dolev-Yao control over all channels

oracle_analysis.interpretation: HNDL-vulnerable: attacker computes ShS from two public ECDH keys via break_dh, then derives KE/KM, decrypts BPP

attack_traces.Q5: Attacker observes otPK.EUICC.ECKA in euiccSigned2 and otPK.DP.ECKA in bind_body, applies break_dh to recover ShS = DH(otSK, otPK)
attack_traces.Q6: With ShS recovered via break_dh, attacker derives KE = kdf_enc(ShS), decrypts BPP = sdec(bpp, KE) to obtain secretProfile

pfs.description: Phase-separated PFS test: single session, signing keys revealed in phase 1, no break_dh
